text.title: PM + Tech-Lead Grooming Agenda Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have an active tech-debt register?

conclusion.verdict: skip — no debt to groom; reroute to simpler backlog grooming

example.trace: input matches `debt_register != empty` → sub-question → `capacity_forecast == true` → conclusion ref=`three-blocks-fixed`.
